sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
def get_pink():
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    pink = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'B' and min([p[0] for p in n['boundary']]) >= 50]
    pink.sort(key=lambda n: min([p[1] for p in n['boundary']]))
    return [n['hash'][:8] for n in pink]

print("Current:", get_pink())
print("State:", last_action_result.get('state', 'unknown'))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
def get_pink():
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    pink = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'B' and min([p[0] for p in n['boundary']]) >= 50]
    pink.sort(key=lambda n: min([p[1] for p in n['boundary']]))
    return [n['hash'][:8] for n in pink]

# Current: ['6610c6e3', '4d73d897', '6f89cc49', '04a8e75f', '6610c6e3']
# These are index 1 in the cycles I enumerated earlier
# Let me try setting all to index 0 (cddd7d2c, c66a83c4, 5fcaa599, f4469c24, cddd7d2c)
# From index 1, need 6 UPs to reach index 0 (1->2->3->4->5->6->0)

# Go to pos 0 and set all to index 0
action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'] + ['UP']*6 + ['RIGHT'] + ['UP']*6 + ['RIGHT'] + ['UP']*6 + ['RIGHT'] + ['UP']*6 + ['RIGHT'] + ['UP']*6)

print("After setting to index 0:", get_pink())
print("State:", last_action_result.get('state', 'unknown'))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
